title: Haplostylis albiceps
taxonomy: Haplostylis albiceps is classified as a species within the genus Haplostylis, which belongs to the family Haplostylidae. This family is part of the order Stomatopoda, commonly known as mantis shrimp. The order Stomatopoda is a group of marine crustaceans. Haplostylis albiceps is a type of stomatopod crustacean that is found in the ocean. The classification of Haplostylis albiceps reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the crustacean phylum.
